mapper.sql: select xl.id, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(xl.file_path, '_', 2), '_', -1) AS vin, xl.file_name, xl.file_path, xl.file_size, xl.file_level, xl.version, xl.is_latest, xl.pdf_path, xl.status, xl.deleted, xl.create_by, xl.create_time, xl.update_by, xl.update_time, xl.remark, xl.xml_template_id, xl.model_code, xl.factory_code, xl.vehicle_material_no, xl.country, xl.upload_result, xl.upload_date, xl.issue_date, xl.validate_result,xt.template_name xml_template_name, xl.validation_report_json, sdd.dict_label model_name from xml_file xl left join xml_template xt on xl.xml_template_id = xt.template_id left join sys_dict_data sdd on sdd.dict_value = xl.model_code
mapper.select:
SELECT file_path FROM xml_file WHERE id IN
#{xmlId}
mapper.insert:
insert into xml_file
file_name, file_path, file_size, file_level, version, is_latest, pdf_path, status, deleted, create_by, remark, model_code, factory_code, vehicle_material_no, country, upload_result, upload_date, issue_date, validate_result, validation_report_json, create_time
#{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileLevel}, #{version}, #{isLatest}, #{pdfPath}, #{status}, #{deleted}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, #{modelCode}, #{factoryCode}, #{vehicleMaterialNo}, #{country}, #{uploadResult}, #{uploadDate}, #{issueDate}, #{validateResult}, #{validationReportJson}, sysdate()
mapper.update: update xml_file set deleted = 2 where id = #{id}

update xml_file set deleted = 2 where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: where xl.file_name like concat(#{configName}, '%') and xl.deleted = 0 order by cast(xl.version as UNSIGNED) desc, xl.create_time desc
mapper.update:
update xml_file set deleted = 0 where id in
#{xmlId}
mapper.delete:
delete from xml_file where deleted = 2 and id in
#{xmlId}
delete from xml_file where deleted = 2 and id = #{xmlId}
delete from xml_file where deleted = 2 and update_time < date_sub(now(), interval 1 month)
mapper.select: SELECT version FROM xml_file WHERE file_name LIKE CONCAT(#{fileName}, '%') ORDER BY cast(version as UNSIGNED) desc limit 1
mapper.update: UPDATE xml_file SET is_latest = 0 WHERE file_name LIKE CONCAT(#{fileName}, '%')
